words.definition: the state of being infatuated or obsessed with another person.
words.example: his limerence faded once they actually started dating.
the sonorous tones of the cathedral organ filled the nave.
she accepted the challenge with alacrity.

words.definition: in the form of a cloud or haze; vague or ill-defined.
words.example: the plan was still nebulous and short on detail.
the team was ebullient after the win.

words.definition: carried out with minimum effort or reflection.
words.example: he gave a perfunctory nod and walked on.

words.definition: optimistic or positive, especially in a difficult situation.
words.example: she remained sanguine about her chances.

words.definition: attractive or appealing in a fresh, innocent way.
words.example: a winsome smile won the crowd over.
